stemHtml: A pilot inadvetently turns an IRS to the OFF position in flight, which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: Attiude information can be recovered in flight
options.b: Depending on aircraft type realignment may not be possible in the air
options.c: The IRS can be realigned by transferring information from another IRS.
options.d: Switching to NAV will regain all navigation functions
